_generated: Auto-generated by scripts/gen-design-system-manifest.ts — do not edit. Edit docs/design-system/themes.manifest.json instead.

core.label: Core
core.blurb: The clean-room rebuild of Core — POS, KDS, Orders, the Guest hub (Inbox + CRM + Loyalty + Concierge + Book) and Service. Dark-first, grotesk display (Bricolage), flat materials, refined Neapolitan burgundy. A separate entity from Admin; operational clarity outranks brand expression.

files.description: Theme stylesheet — scoped reset + the shell (.core-bar/.core-switch/.core-sub) + global-action primitives (.core-chip/.core-iconbtn/.core-clock/.core-tabs/.core-seg) + the POS surface (.core-pos/.core-rail/.core-prod/.core-ticket). @imports tokens.css.
Design tokens scoped under .core[data-theme=dark|light]. Dark is the default; light is the option. Surfaces, ink, lines, brand, semantics, elevation, type, radius, motion.

Alternate skin 'Solare' (data-skin=solare) — a warm-daylight Core: sun-bleached parchment surfaces + terracotta brand for bright service. Redefines the --bg/--ink/--brand token palette under .core[data-skin=solare] (light base + a warm-dim dark variant). Swap it in /admin/settings → Themes. See docs/design-system/core/skins.md.

core.fonts: src/app/core/layout.tsx loads its OWN next/font instances — --font-core-display (Bricolage Grotesque, opsz axis), --font-core-ui (Inter), --font-core-mono (JetBrains Mono). No --font-admin-*; a Core font tweak can't move Admin.

admin.label: Admin
admin.blurb: The back-office around the Core modules: Operations, Inventory, People, Customers, Finance, Growth, Intelligence, System. Glassmorphism + warm-neutral dark canvas.

files.description: Shared base CSS surface (formerly themes/admin): [data-admin-theme="dark"|"light"] token blocks + AdminShell + glass-* + v2-* + admin mobile (.v2-m-*). Kept as the base for login + the staff portals + Core; outlives the v2 deletion.
Typed mirror of the [data-admin-theme] tokens for Recharts + inline SVG + the boot script that sets the theme attribute before paint.

Alternate skin 'Blueprint' (data-skin=blueprint) for Admin v3 — a cool drafting-table console: deep navy canvas, cyan brand, blue hairlines, sharper radii. Redefines the --av3-* token palette under .av3-root[data-skin=blueprint] (dark + light variants, honouring the light/dark toggle). Swap it in /admin/settings → Themes. See docs/design-system/admin/skins.md.

admin.fonts: src/app/admin/layout.tsx loads its own Inter + Fraunces as --font-admin-body and --font-admin-display. /manager, /kitchen, /franchisee, /login and /terminal layouts load the same independently (they sit outside the AdminShell but stay admin-themed) so a font change in one wouldn't drift admin.

homepage.label: Homepage
homepage.blurb: The public storefront — /, /menu, /checkout, /order, /rewards, location pages. Hospitality outranks density; warm cream canvas + deep burgundy brand.

files.description: @theme inline block. @import-ed by globals.css so Tailwind v4 generates bg-italia-* / text-italia-* utilities (ships globally).
.pub-* form classes, body styling, delivery-* keyframes. JS-imported by (public)/layout.tsx, route-scoped.
Typed JS mirror of --color-italia-* tokens. Imported into the swatches below.

Alternate skin 'Notte' (data-skin=notte) — a candle-lit night storefront: deep espresso canvas, warm cream ink, ochre/terracotta glow. Scoped under body[data-skin=notte] (set via a pre-paint boot script + HomepageSkinSync so it reaches Rule-#4 portal overlays). Redefines the --color-* tokens + re-points the @theme-inline utilities the storefront uses. Swap it in /admin/settings → Themes. See docs/design-system/homepage/skins.md.

homepage.fonts: src/app/(public)/layout.tsx loads its own Lora + Cormorant Garamond as --font-homepage-body and --font-homepage-heading (V8 Trattoria editorial-serif duo). Independent next/font instances from admin so weight / subset changes don't drift across themes.
